<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused. Do not include real secrets or
API keys in code, tests, or the diff.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and, more importantly, why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally (`pnpm clean` first if files moved/renamed)
- [ ] Changes match the surrounding code style and comment density
- [ ] New operations are defined as Zod contracts (so REST, MCP, and OpenAPI stay in sync)
- [ ] Docs in `docs/` updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data in the diff
